  <ppt-rect x="0" y="0" w="13.333" h="7.5" fill="#1E3A5F" fill-opacity="0.85" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Decorative geometric shapes -->
  <ppt-rect x="9.333" y="0" w="4" h="7.5" fill="#2563EB" fill-opacity="0.3" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="10.5" y="1" w="1.5" h="1.5" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.1" shape="oval" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Main title -->
  <ppt-text x="1" y="2.5" w="8" h="2" font-size="52" bold="true" align="left" color="#FFFFFF" font-name="Arial Black">
    {{TITLE}}
  </ppt-text>
  
   <!-- Subtitle with accent -->
  <ppt-rect x="1" y="4.8" w="3" h="0.08" fill="#3B82F6" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-text x="1" y="5" w="7" h="0.8" font-size="22" align="left" color="#CBD5E1">
    {{SUBTITLE}}
  </ppt-text>
  
   <!-- Author info -->
  <ppt-text x="1" y="6.5" w="6" h="0.5" font-size="14" align="left" color="#E2E8F0">
    {{AUTHOR}}  •  {{DATE}}
  </ppt-text>
</ppt-slide>
<!-- Cover Variant 8: Geometric Split Design -->
<ppt-slide width="13.333" height="7.5" theme="academic" auto-bg="true">
   <!-- Left panel - dark -->
  <ppt-rect x="0" y="0" w="7" h="7.5" fill="#0F172A" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Right panel - light -->
  <ppt-rect x="7" y="0" w="6.333" h="7.5" fill="#F8FAFC" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Diagonal divider -->
  <ppt-rect x="6.5" y="0" w="1.5" h="7.5" fill="#3B82F6" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Title on left -->
  <ppt-text x="0.8" y="2" w="5.5" h="2.5" font-size="42" bold="true" align="left" color="#FFFFFF" line-spacing="1.1">
    {{TITLE}}
  </ppt-text>
  
   <!-- Subtitle on left -->
  <ppt-text x="0.8" y="4.8" w="5.5" h="1" font-size="18" align="left" color="#94A3B8">
    {{SUBTITLE}}
  </ppt-text>
  
   <!-- Decorative line -->
  <ppt-rect x="0.8" y="5.5" w="2" h="0.06" fill="#3B82F6" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Right side decorative element -->
  <ppt-rect x="8.5" y="2" w="3" h="3" fill="#64748B" shape="rounded" line-width="0" radius="0.2"/>
  <ppt-rect x="9" y="2.5" w="2" h="2" fill="#3B82F6" fill-opacity="0.2" shape="oval" line-width="0"/>
</ppt-slide>
 <!-- Cover Variant 9: Centered with Abstract Frame -->
<ppt-slide width="13.333" height="7.5" theme="academic" auto-bg="true">
   <!-- Outer frame -->
  <ppt-rect x="0.5" y="0.5" w="12.333" h="6.5" fill="#FFFFFF" line="#1E293B" line-width="2" shape="rect"/>
  
   <!-- Inner accent rectangle -->
  <ppt-rect x="1" y="1" w="11.333" h="5.5" fill="#F8FAFC" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Corner decorations -->
  <ppt-rect x="1" y="1" w="1.5" h="0.1" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="1" y="1" w="0.1" h="1.5" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="11.833" y="1" w="1.5" h="0.1" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="12.233" y="1" w="0.1" h="1.5" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="1" y="6.5" w="1.5" h="0.1" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="1" y="5" w="0.1" h="1.5" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="11.833" y="6.5" w="1.5" h="0.1" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-rect x="12.233" y="5" w="0.1" h="1.5" fill="#2563EB" line-width="0"/>
  
   <!-- Main title -->
  <ppt-text x="1.5" y="2" w="10.333" h="1.8" font-size="44" bold="true" align="center" color="#0F172A">
    {{TITLE}}
  </ppt-text>
  
   <!-- Subtitle -->
  <ppt-text x="1.5" y="4" w="10.333" h="0.8" font-size="22" align="center" color="#475569" italic="true">
    {{SUBTITLE}}
  </ppt-text>
  
   <!-- Bottom info -->
  <ppt-rect x="5.666" y="5.2" w="2" h="0.06" fill="#3B82F6" line-width="0"/>
  <ppt-text x="2" y="5.5" w="9.333" h="0.6" font-size="14" align="center" color="#64748B">
    {{AUTHOR}}  •  {{DATE}}
  </ppt-text>
</ppt-slide>
